name: IRC_LI_REQUISITION_MAPPING
description: Stores the requisition mapping between ORC and LinkedIn

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table and also foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B

columns.Name: LI_JOB_POSTING_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Job Posting Task Identifier from LinkedIn

columns.Name: LI_JOB_POSTING_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the posting status of ORC job in LinkedIn. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_LI_RSC_JOB_POSTING_STATUS

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_INFO1
columns.Comments: To store additional info for the requisition

columns.Name: LI_JOB_POSTING_URN
columns.Comments: Job Posting Identifier from LinkedIn

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: Location details of the requisition

columns.Name: HTTP_CODE
columns.Comments: The HTTP status code received from LI

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: If the location of this row is the current location for the requisition

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Represents the action code of Requisition synchronization

columns.Name: REQUISITION_SYNC_STATUS
columns.Comments: Represents the status code of Requisition synchronization

columns.Name: REQUISITION_SYNC_ERROR
columns.Comments: Synchronization error of Requisition, if any such error happened

columns.Name: REQUISITION_SYNC_INFO
columns.Comments: Additional Information from requisition synchronization

columns.Name: REQUISITION_SYNC_DATE
columns.Comments: Requsisition Last synchronization Date

columns.Name: CALL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents the source of this record, requisition and requisition status

columns.Name: REQUISITION_PAYLOAD
columns.Comments: This is the column to store OAC(Onsite Apply Configuration) data for Requisition
